stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Chart E(LO)6 from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
While following airways, select the shortest distance route to fly from Mallorca VOR (MJV) (N39°26' E002°45') to Barcelona VOR (BCN) (N41°18', E002°06').

options.b: MJV - A29 - ADX - W2 - NOVAS - G7 - BCN
options.c: MJV - A29 - ADX - N861 - RODRA - B28 - BCN
options.d: MJV - A29 - ADX - W2 - BISES - R870 - BCN
